title: Eval regression fixtures (observation only)
policy: Do NOT attempt to fix these in the query path. These are regression fixtures for eval re-runs — not open product limitations and not drivers for clean-file conversion (Phase 2 SHELVED 2026-07-19).
infra_note: Prior 'dense PDF unretrievable' / high miss rates were largely null file_search_document_name. Mirror PDF fresh-20 = 18/20; SSE PDF fresh-20 = 19/20 (2026-07-19).

cases.question: What's the fee for a Company Employee List?
Cost to add 2 extra business activities beyond the free three?
cases.expect: 2 × 1,000 = 2,000 (setup Extra Business Activity only; no amendment)
cases.observed_on_pdf_sse_2026_07_19: PASS — setup 1,000/activity only (g=1); no amendment conflation this run

cases.question: Does Meydan require WPS?
cases.observed_on_pdf_sse_2026_07_19: Auto-scored PASS but answer hedges — quotes 'no wps require' from mainland-renewal context and says docs don't confirm for Meydan (g=1). Scorer false-positive risk on \bno\b.

cases.question: Compare establishment card costs between IFZA and Meydan.
grounding_chunk_sources_sse_2026_07_19: Ifza - Licesen cost - Shedule off charges (1).pdf
Ifza - Licesen cost - Shedule off charges (1).pdf
Ifza - Licesen cost - Shedule off charges (1).pdf
Ifza - Licesen cost - Shedule off charges (1).pdf
cases.note: All 4 grounding chunks were IFZA PDF; zero Meydan. Not model-ignored-content — File Search ranked only IFZA for a compare question. Meydan est-card (2020) was retrievable on adjacent Q15 same run. Do not fix in query path from this observation alone.

cases.question: I want to add an individual shareholder to my IFZA company. What fee do I pay?
What's the difference between the Investor Visa Add-On fee and the Visa Amendment fee? Quote both exact labels and figures.
cases.expect: Investor Visa Add-On = 1,000; Visa Amendment = 2,000–4,000 (must not collapse Amendment to 1,000)
cases.observed_on_original_pdf: Quoted Visa Amendment = AED 1,000 — same figure as Investor Visa Add-On (label/figure swap)
cases.note: Classic swap-test. Fresh-20 never included this. Clean structured labels fix it; dense PDF fails consistently (0/3).

cases.question: Is the Cross Business Activity Fee waived? Quote the exact condition and effective amount for a new application.
cases.expect: Waived for new applications and the next three renewals (4 years); effective 0 for new application
cases.observed_on_original_pdf: Previously claimed exemption not stated in documents (batch contradiction)
cases.note: Waiver is on PDF ~p9. Intermittent on dense PDF (user saw miss; this H2H 3/3 pass). Clean md 3/3. Keep in permanent set.

cases.question: New IFZA company, 3-year Zero Visa license, plus establishment card — total upfront?
cases.note: Same PDF contains both 38,700 and 31,000; path/run variance.
